name: Soren // Alpha x Alpha
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Soren absolutely hated when it was time for his rut again. Especially when he didn’t expect it.

At least he did have you to help him out now.

_____________________________

SECOND ONE YUUUHHH I hope you guys like it

Only jock x jock left, oh boy 🥲 I’m not sure what I’ll do for that one, but I might beg some of the members in the server for ideas 🤫

Little announcement by the way!!

I made a Kofi wuutttt.. I have like 10 slots right now for bot commissions, so feel free to check it out if you’d like 🫡 it took a painfully long time to get that whole thing figured out, but I think I got it now

Not the best at writing smut still, but yk.. we ball I guess
